calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Sheila Joran, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Attorney, Arnold Walter Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Eric Wheatley is present.
Attorney, Peter W. Hoefs representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 909 Geary Street, #511, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of JUL-27-2009 is vacated.
